scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace worker" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace worker && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,worker,frontend "API_PORT=${API_PORT:-4000} npm run start --workspace backend" "npm run start --workspace worker" "API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:${API_PORT:-4000}} npm run start --workspace frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace worker && npm run lint --workspace frontend
